## What changed

Describe the catalog entry, correction, or site change.

## Evidence

Link the original repository, model card, and relevant license material.

## Checks

- [ ] I ran `npm run generate`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run check`.
- [ ] I separated the code license from the model-weight license.
- [ ] I used first-party sources for factual claims.
- [ ] I disclosed any relationship with a listed project.
- [ ] Any voice sample has documented speaker permission.
